title: Array Technologies Inc Q2 2024 Earnings Results
text: Array Technologies reported Q2 2024 earnings per share of $0.17, beating consensus estimates of $0.14. Revenue totaled $255.77 million, up 11% from consensus estimate of $230 million. Adjusted gross margin reached 35%, reflecting strong operational execution. Adjusted EBITDA reached $55.4 million. Despite positive earnings beat, company issued reduced guidance for full year 2024 due to project timing delays and macroeconomic headwinds. Management noted that project delays in Q2 appear to be primarily timing-related rather than cancellations, with 80% of order book scheduled for delivery between mid-2024 and year-end 2025. Company maintains strong liquidity with cash reserves and undrawn credit facilities totaling approximately $435 million.
